evidenceReviewed.source: OpenSpec artifacts: design, runtime spec, tasks, runtime/output helper tests.
evidenceReviewed.summary: OpenSpec artifacts: design, runtime spec, tasks, runtime/output helper tests.

evidenceReviewed.source: Tool outputs / validation: `npm run validate:strict`, `npm test`, `openspec validate --all`, and `npm run autopilot:validate -- openspec/changes/autopilot-live-regression/automation/task.json` passed on 2026-06-12.
evidenceReviewed.summary: Tool outputs / validation: `npm run validate:strict`, `npm test`, `openspec validate --all`, and `npm run autopilot:validate -- openspec/changes/autopilot-live-regression/automation/task.json` passed on 2026-06-12.

evidenceReviewed.source: Reviewer gates: `code-quality-reviewer`, `test-coverage-reviewer`, `instruction-artifact-reviewer`, and targeted coverage recheck passed after fixes.
evidenceReviewed.summary: Reviewer gates: `code-quality-reviewer`, `test-coverage-reviewer`, `instruction-artifact-reviewer`, and targeted coverage recheck passed after fixes.

evidenceReviewed.source: Autopilot/runtime events: plugin runtime selection was unavailable through MVP dispatch, so the task proceeded through deterministic helper tests without manual protected-state mutation.
evidenceReviewed.summary: Autopilot/runtime events: plugin runtime selection was unavailable through MVP dispatch, so the task proceeded through deterministic helper tests without manual protected-state mutation.

problems.problem: Parallel guard missed task-specific forbidden scopes
problems.evidence: Coverage review found only write-write overlap was checked
problems.impact: Explicit parallel implementation could start unsafe concurrent tasks
problems.rootCause: Parallel compatibility checking considered write-write conflicts before task-specific forbidden scopes were propagated
problems.recommendation: Propagate `scope.forbidden` into ledger summaries and enforce write-vs-forbidden compatibility with a regression test
problems.noFollowUpReason: Propagate `scope.forbidden` into ledger summaries and enforce write-vs-forbidden compatibility with a regression test

problems.problem: Claim continuity needed observable runtime state
problems.evidence: Reviewer wave found claim output could imply persisted active state without stop continuity evidence
problems.rootCause: Claim output lacked a persisted state-continuity contract linking claim, stop, and status evidence
problems.recommendation: Add claim to stop continuity tests and plugin-owned active runtime evidence
problems.noFollowUpReason: Add claim to stop continuity tests and plugin-owned active runtime evidence

problems.evidence: Reviewer wave found repeated collect could be ambiguous
problems.impact: Worker reports could appear advanced more than once
problems.rootCause: Report consumption state was not tracked as durable idempotency evidence
problems.recommendation: Track consumed report ids and test repeated collect behavior
problems.noFollowUpReason: Track consumed report ids and test repeated collect behavior

archiveGate.reason: Evidence reviewed, runtime safety findings fixed, reviewer rechecks clean, and validation passed
